title: Datapatched
description: A library mod focused on data-driven features with a simple cross-loader loot modifier format.
body:
# Datapatched

Datapatched is a simple library mod that aims to add to and improve data-driven features. Currently, it introduces a simplified cross-loader loot modifier format. You can use these features in datapacks if you're in an environment with the mod installed.

I run a fork of Misode's generator site that has Datapatched support which you can find [here](https://lithostitched.vercel.app/datapatched/).
